title: Bound Fate mirrors damage from your primary to opponent primary

card.rawText: During this turn all damage inflicted on your primary creature is also inflicted on your opponents' primary creature.

effect.value: During this turn all damage inflicted on your primary creature is also inflicted on your opponents' primary creature.

plan.title: Bound Fate mirrors damage from your primary to opponent primary
plan.summary: Play Bound Fate and verify damage inflicted on your primary is also inflicted on the opponent primary this turn.

notes: Read text first: During this turn all damage inflicted on your primary creature is also inflicted on your opponents' primary creature.
After Bound Fate resolves, apply a deterministic damage event to player_1 primary and verify mirrored damage.

steps: Inflict damage to player_1 primary during the same turn.
Verify player_2 primary takes matching damage.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Play Bound Fate and verify damage inflicted on your primary is also inflicted on the opponent primary this turn.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
